title: Dataset for "Exploring the Potential of Various Cyclodextrin-based Derivatives in Enzyme Supramolecular Engineering" research article
author: Nazemi, Seyed Amirabbas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The dataset for the paper titled "Exploring the Potential of Various Cyclodextrin-based Derivatives in Enzyme Supramolecular Engineering". The dataset includes the following items:  1. "alpha-CD-TES_Characterization" xls file (1 file) including 5 datasheets; These data sheets provide raw characterization data regarding the synthesis of the alpha-CD-TES molecule including 1H NMR, 13C NMR, FTIR, ESI-MS, and MALDI. 
 2. "beta-CD-TES_Characterization" xls file (1 file) including 5 datasheets; These data sheets provide raw characterization data regarding the synthesis of the beta-CD-TES molecule including 1H NMR, 13C NMR, FTIR, ESI-MS, and MALDI. 
 3. "gamma-CD-TES_Characterization" xls file (1 file) including 5 datasheets; These data sheets provide raw characterization data regarding the synthesis of the gamma-CD-TES molecule including 1H NMR, 13C NMR, FTIR, ESI-MS, and MALDI.  4. "Activities" xls file (1 file) including 6 datasheets; These datasheets contain the raw data of the enzymatic activities measured for both LipMRD9 and A50 enzymes for each set of stability experiments reported in the manuscript or the supporting information documents. 
 5. "Layer growth - A50" zip file including 5 files: The unprocessed SEM micrographs of A50 enzyme shielding with alpha/beta/gamma-CD-TES building blocks (after 75 min reaction) and the corresponding size measurements in an xls file. 
 6. "Layer growth - LipMRD9" zip file including 15 files: The unprocessed SEM micrographs of the shielded LipMRD9 enzyme with α-, β-, and γ-CD-TES building blocks (after 30, 60, 90, and 120 min reaction) and the corresponding size measurements (using ImageJ software) saved in separate xls files.
